description:
Receive MDI webhooks through the shared serverless webhook pattern.

**Scope**
- Verify required MDI webhook authentication/signature material before state changes.
- Record provider event ID/status in DynamoDB for idempotency.
- Process safe status mirrors inline or enqueue retryable actions to SQS/DLQ.
- Register no-op handling for safe-to-ignore launch events based on T-052.

**Acceptance**
- Invalid MDI webhook auth produces no side effects.
- Duplicate event ID is idempotent.
- Must-handle events update only minimal local status/pointers and evidence records.
title: MDI webhook receiver: verification + idempotent serverless processing
